content: Documentation debt pattern: The app evolved a 3-mode architecture (FocusModeScreen, TimelineJourneyScreen, EditModeScreen) from the originally planned single "Goal Detail" screen. user-flows.md still describes 7 screens while codebase has 20+. When docs fall behind, the most important gaps are in architectural evolution docs (user-flows, screen maps) not in technical implementation details.

README writing pattern: navigation/types.ts is the reliable source for screen map docs (typed param lists show exact routes and params). package.json for versions. CLAUDE.md for commands. src/db/schema.ts for data model status.
